title: GENERAL MANAGER
description:
• Assess the organisation's principal risks.
  • Build relationships and seek out networking opportunities with key strategic stakeholders.
  • Challenge new ideas while actively balancing risks and opportunities.
  • Champion succession planning initiative for key management positions.
  • Develop long-term strategic business plans to maintain a leading position in the marketplace.
  • Endorse organisational quality management policies.
  • Ensure that the board is adequately informed of quality management related matters.
  • Ensure that the organisation has appropriate Workplace Safety and Health (WSH) to enable it to conduct activities both lawfully and ethically.
  • Establish organisational business performance indicators and measurement standards.
  • Explore value and expectations of key strategic stakeholders.
  • Formulate the organisation's employee development system for the advancement of high performing leaders and workforce in line with organisation's mission and emerging trends of the industry.
  • Foster a culture of excellence and innovation where employees conduct activities that follow Workplace Safety and Health (WSH) regulations.
  • Nurture an organisational culture that complies with Workplace Safety and Health (WSH) internal and external standards and regulations.
  • Promote Workplace Safety and Health (WSH) across the organisation.
  • Review organisational business performance against plans to recognise achievements.
  • Set direction for organisational budget planning in consultation with stakeholders.
  • Set organisational business goals for high performance and growth.
  • Steer the organisation to achieve excellence in a globalised environment.

postedCompany.description:
Nanyang Asia College (NYAC) is a professional college and was first established in 1993 and registered with Singapore’s Committee for Private Education (CPE), which is part of SkillsFuture Singapore (SSG) since 2011.


NYAC comprises of a group of highly qualified and distinguished academic and non-academic staff; and provides a good learning environment for students, adopting various teaching methods used in other developed countries like the U.S.A and United Kingdom. Pacing and adopting suitable teaching methods to the learners’ level, NYAC has since produced a number of bilingual talents. It has established a positive image in South East Asia especially in Singapore, recruiting both local and international students throughout the year.


The NYAC campus in Jurong East is located near the MRT amongst different educational and business establishments. It is also easily accessible via any means of transport. The Jurong East Regional library is within walking distance of NYAC.


The NYAC environment is conducive for students as there are numerous schools in the vicinity.

For nearly three decades, NYAC has produced many talents. All the teachers of NYAC are registered with the Council for Private Education (Singapore) and possesses high academic qualifications.
postedCompany.name: NANYANG ASIA COLLEGE PTE. LTD.
